name: Do not boil chemically contaminated water
warning: If chemical, fuel, pesticide, industrial or heavy metal contamination is suspected, do not boil the water. Boiling does not remove these and can concentrate some of them. Use a different water source and seek proper laboratory testing.

name: Chlorination does not remove chemical contamination
warning: Household chlorination only addresses microbial contamination. It does not make chemically contaminated water safe. Use another source.

name: Reduce turbidity before disinfection
warning: Turbidity is above 5 NTU. Let particles settle and filter the water before chlorination, otherwise disinfection may be ineffective.
